ideas.title: Rope Riot
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.core_mechanic: Drag-to-whip physics rope combat
ideas.one_liner: Swing a rope to knock enemies into pits before they swarm you.

ideas.title: Bubble Collapse
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.core_mechanic: Timed tap chain-reaction popping
ideas.one_liner: Tap to pop the right bubble at the right moment to trigger a chain collapse.

ideas.title: Gravity Well
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.core_mechanic: Tap-to-redirect physics via gravity well placement
ideas.one_liner: Tap to create gravity wells that suck in asteroids before they hit your planet.

ideas.title: Domino Drop
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.core_mechanic: Precision drag placement to complete physics chain
ideas.one_liner: Place one domino in exactly the right spot to topple the entire chain.

ideas.title: Magma Flow
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.core_mechanic: Draw-to-redirect fluid physics
ideas.one_liner: Draw walls to guide lava to targets before it hardens.

ideas.title: Echo Bounce
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.core_mechanic: Tap-direction pulse that bounces with geometry logic
ideas.one_liner: Tap to launch a sound pulse that bounces off walls to destroy enemies.

ideas.title: Wrecking Swing
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.core_mechanic: One-tap pendulum release for physics destruction
ideas.one_liner: Tap to release a wrecking ball at the perfect moment to demolish the tower.

ideas.title: Orbit Catch
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.core_mechanic: Two-tap orbital intercept timing
ideas.one_liner: Tap to launch your catcher into orbit, then tap again to grab falling items.

ideas.title: Chain Zap
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.core_mechanic: Swipe-to-draw electricity path through conductor nodes
ideas.one_liner: Swipe to draw a lightning path that must hit all conductors before grounding.

ideas.title: Spin Clash
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.core_mechanic: Flick-to-dash momentum combat on circular platform
ideas.one_liner: Flick to spin your top and smash opponents off the platform before yours slows down.

ideas.title: Escalator Chaos
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.core_mechanic: Swipe commuters to correct escalator lanes before overflow
ideas.one_liner: Shove commuters onto the right escalator before the rush hour collapses civilization

ideas.title: Laundry Avalanche
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.core_mechanic: Tap falling clothes to fold before they land
ideas.one_liner: Fold the infinite mountain of laundry before it buries your entire apartment

ideas.title: Microwave Panic
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.core_mechanic: Stop a countdown timer in a shrinking golden window
ideas.one_liner: Stop the microwave at exactly the right second or suffer the consequences of exploded leftovers

ideas.title: Office Chair Olympics
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.core_mechanic: Tilt-swipe to steer a spinning office chair through obstacles
ideas.one_liner: Spin, drift and dodge your way through the office on a runaway wheeled chair

ideas.title: Vending Machine Vengeance
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.core_mechanic: Apply precise escalating force to dislodge items without toppling machine
ideas.one_liner: Shake, tilt and smack the vending machine until your stuck snack finally drops

ideas.title: Spam Call Smash
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.core_mechanic: Tap to hang up spam calls, hold to answer real ones
ideas.one_liner: Hang up on spam callers faster than your patience runs out

ideas.title: Shopping Cart Slalom
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.core_mechanic: Tap to nudge an unpredictable physics-driven cart through aisles
ideas.one_liner: Navigate a runaway shopping cart through a chaotic supermarket without wiping out the soup aisle

ideas.title: Elevator Etiquette
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.core_mechanic: Route passengers to floors while managing social compatibility
ideas.one_liner: Manage the most socially awkward elevator in the world without anyone making eye contact

ideas.title: Bubble Wrap Frenzy
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.core_mechanic: Rapidly tap all bubbles on moving sheet before it exits screen
ideas.one_liner: Pop every bubble on the packing wrap before the package reaches the delivery truck

ideas.title: Parking Spot Panic
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.core_mechanic: Race and maneuver to claim parking spots ahead of AI rivals
ideas.one_liner: Claim the last parking spot in the lot before someone else parallel parks into your dreams

ideas.title: Noodle Lasso
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.core_mechanic: Elastic whip-catch
ideas.one_liner: Swing a stretchy noodle to catch falling ingredients before they hit the floor.

ideas.title: Bubble Siege
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.core_mechanic: Strategic bubble pop → physics collapse
ideas.one_liner: Pop the right bubbles to collapse the enemy tower before it crushes yours.

ideas.title: Gravity Golf
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.core_mechanic: Orbital physics flick-shot
ideas.one_liner: Flick a ball through a rotating space course where gravity shifts between planets.

ideas.title: Ink Flood
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.core_mechanic: Liquid flow navigation via tap-to-open channels
ideas.one_liner: Tap to release ink that floods the board — cover every pixel before the timer runs out.

ideas.title: Chain Reaction Duel
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.core_mechanic: Turn-based critical mass chain explosion
ideas.one_liner: Place one atom per turn to trigger the biggest chain explosion and wipe the board.

ideas.title: Swipe Dojo
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.core_mechanic: Directional swipe rhythm combat
ideas.one_liner: Swipe in exact directions to block and counter enemy attacks in split-second rhythmic combat.

ideas.title: Magma Drop
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.core_mechanic: Precision drip-aim melting puzzle
ideas.one_liner: Drop magma blobs precisely to melt ice platforms and reach the gem below each stage.

ideas.title: Word Smash
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.core_mechanic: Fling-to-spell under time pressure
ideas.one_liner: Catapult letter blocks at a word target — correct spelling sends them flying, wrong letters bounce back and kill you.

ideas.title: Tidal Rush
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.core_mechanic: Auto-running platform leap ahead of rising water
ideas.one_liner: Surf ahead of a rising tide by jumping platforms that the water destroys from below.

ideas.title: Flip Burger
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.core_mechanic: Multi-patty precision timing flip
ideas.one_liner: Flip patties with perfect timing to cook them exactly right — burnt or raw and the customer walks.
